name: 60-Month Amortization of Child Care Facilities

eligibility.description: The facility must be tangible property located in the U.S. and operated primarily for children of employees.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employers can amortize the adjusted basis of a child care facility provided through a welfare benefit fund over a 60-month period instead of standard depreciation.
